title: Connect multiple status columns to a view and have a different workflow
excerpt: I’d like to create a view per person on what leave they’ve taken overall and in a particular month

posts.author: LaraResnick (Lara Resnick)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to create a view per person on what leave they’ve taken overall and in a particular month

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LaraResnick - the details are a bit scarce here. You could create a dynamic view “My Leave” that would filter the board based on the current user (dynamic) and the current month.

image1128×344 29.9 KB

Not sure if this is what you are looking for or not?
